name: Greek Burgers
recipeIngredient: 4 hamburger buns, hard rolls or pitas, sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine all ingredients except the buns and garnishes; mix well.
2. Form into four patties.
3. Pan-fry, grill or broil until no longer pink.
4. Serve on buns with cucumbers, tomatoes and ranch salad dressing, if desired.
